description: Immutable Core — Single Source of Truth. These skill files are protected from modification by RSI and MUST exist on disk. All other references (environment-doctor, run_tests.ps1, immutable-core-directives) MUST derive their protected lists from this file.

rules.modification: NEVER modify these files via RSI or any automated process
rules.self_protection: immutable-core.json IS IN ITS OWN LIST. Any modification to this file is a CRITICAL integrity violation — the guard's guard cannot be removed.
rules.tamper_detection: If modification is detected, report CRITICAL integrity violation to user
rules.addition: New skills may only be added to this list with explicit user approval and a corresponding update to all derived references
